hypothesis: Augmenting MatAgent with a synthesizability evaluator trained on experimental synthesis records and incorporating synthesizability as an explicit feedback objective will produce, within 15 iterations, a set of proposed compositions whose proportion matching experimentally realized compounds in the ICSD or exceeding a validated synthesizability-score threshold increases by at least 25% while maintaining at least 80% of the original formation-energy target success rate (±0.25 eV/atom), compared to the original MatAgent without synthesizability feedback.
